SAVE FILES
📤 Export Save Code
Copy this code and store it somewhere safe. Paste it back to restore your progress.
📥 Import Save Code
Paste a previously exported code below, then click Load. This replaces your current save entirely.
⚠ Reset All Progress
Permanently erases all game data. You will start fresh as a new player.
